home.heroTitle: Bank with confidence, harvest the rewards
home.heroSubtitle: Mutual fund from {title} Asset Management that invests in corporate bonds in dollars, euros and pounds, helping you grow your money securely.
home.onlineBankingDesc: Secure access to all your accounts, payments and investments in a single place.
home.transactionsSubtitle: Find out what to look out for when transacting online and how we keep you safe.
home.fxText: Convert between major currencies instantly with transparent, real-time rates.
home.bulkText: Pay salaries, suppliers and partners in one go, with full control and tracking.
home.secureText: Multi-factor authentication, encryption and continuous monitoring.
home.convenienceTitle: For convenience in the digital age
home.step1Text: Open your first account, get your debit card and access codes straight from your mobile.
home.step2Text: Get full control of your transactions and products from your computer.
home.step3Text: Secure a consumer loan of up to $10,000 online with a fully digital application.

dashboard.createAccountSubtitle: Sign up for your UBA Senegal e-banking account

clientDashboard.startByTransferring: Start by making a transfer or depositing funds.
clientDashboard.completeProfile: Complete your profile to get the most out of your account.

transfer.processingPleaseWait: Please wait while we process your transaction
transfer.processingPleaseWaitInternational: Please wait while we process your international transfer
transfer.whatHappensNextLocal: Your transfer is now being processed. It may take up to {days} working days to be completed and credited to the beneficiary. You will be notified once the transfer is approved.
transfer.whatHappensNextInternational: Your international transfer is being processed. It may take up to {days} working days to be completed and credited to the beneficiary. You will be notified once the transfer is approved.
transfer.codesInstructions: Enter your transfer codes below. If you don't have them, contact your administrator.
transfer.codesValidFor: This request is valid for 24 hours.
transfer.formSubtitleLocal: Send money to a local bank account
transfer.daysNote: Transfers may take up to 2 working days to complete.
transfer.daysNoteInternational: International transfers may take up to 2 working days to complete.
transfer.daysConfirm: Transfers may take up to {days} working days to be processed and credited.
transfer.daysConfirmInternational: International transfers may take up to {days} working days to be processed and credited.

account.viewAndAdjust: View and adjust balances, add accounts.

accountProfile.title: Account Profile
accountProfile.subtitle: Your personal and bank information
accountProfile.name: Name
accountProfile.noNok: No next of kin on file.
accountProfile.completeProfile: Complete your profile to get the most out of your account.

accountSecurity.title: Security
accountSecurity.subtitle: Manage your PIN and password
accountSecurity.pinDescription: Use a 4-digit PIN to authorize transactions.
accountSecurity.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

accountKyc.title: KYC Verification
accountKyc.subtitle: Identity verification status
accountKyc.verifiedMessage: Your identity has been verified. You have full access to all services.
accountKyc.pendingMessage: Your documents are under review. You will be notified when verification is complete.
accountKyc.rejectedDefault: Your submission was rejected. Please resubmit valid documents.
accountKyc.noneMessage: Submit your identity documents to verify your account and unlock all features.
accountKyc.govIdDesc: Passport, driver's license, or national ID
accountKyc.proofOfAddressDesc: Utility bill, bank statement, or similar (within 3 months)
accountKyc.selfieWithIdDesc: Clear photo of you holding your ID
accountKyc.acceptedFormats: Accepted: JPEG, PNG, WebP, PDF. Max 5MB per file.

transferHistory.title: Transfer History
transferHistory.subtitle: View your transaction and processing transfers

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.subtitle: Add funds to your account
deposit.chequeNote: Cheques typically clear in 3–5 business days. Funds will be credited once cleared.

personalPage.title: Personal Banking
personalPage.description: Tailored banking solutions for individuals. Manage your accounts, make payments, and grow your savings with our personal banking services.

corporatePage.title: Corporate Banking
corporatePage.description: Comprehensive banking solutions for businesses. Corporate accounts, bulk payments, trade finance, and dedicated support for your enterprise needs.

depositsPage.title: Deposit Options
depositsPage.currentDepositText: Current account is safer, more flexible and suitable for personal and business purposes. Withdraw or transfer by cheque with unlimited amount.
depositsPage.savingsDepositText: Savings account is convenient for daily transactions, deposits, withdrawals and fund transfers.
depositsPage.fixedDepositText: Fixed deposit is safer, more attractive and suitable for longer-term high-yield deposit redeemed on maturity date.
depositsPage.saveiAccountText: Save-i account ties savings or fixed deposit to special insurance for accidental coverage.
depositsPage.telebankingNote: For urgent banking or inquiries, {title} offers Tele-banking 24/7.

loansPage.title: {title} Loan Profile
loansPage.subtitle: {title} makes installment loans at all full-service bank locations.
loansPage.intro1: Auto loans (new or used), recreational vehicles, boats, and leisure vehicles. We also offer Personal Loans for dream vacations or emergencies.
loansPage.intro2: Loans can fund personal expenses, homes (mortgage), cars (auto), education (student) or business. Borrowers submit an application; the bank evaluates and sets terms if approved.

cardsPage.title: Card Services
cardsPage.debitCardDesc: Amount is directly deducted from your linked bank account.
cardsPage.creditCardDesc: Comes with a predetermined credit limit based on your credit history and income.
cardsPage.prepaidCardDesc: Use funds you've already loaded onto the card.
cardsPage.virtualCardDesc: Designed for online and card-not-present transactions.
cardsPage.masterCardDesc: A global payment network facilitating electronic funds transfers.
cardsPage.visaCardDesc: Visa operates an extensive payment network for secure electronic transactions.
cardsPage.applyViaEBanking: Apply for a card via E-Banking
